title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 811 至 968 行，共 1250 行) ---
 811 |     def _extract_compressed_state(
 812 |         self,
 813 |         turns: List[ConversationTurn],
 814 |         dropped_turns: Optional[List[ConversationTurn]] = None,
 815 |         llm_summary_text: str = "",
 816 |     ) -> CompressedSessionState:
 817 |         """Build a deterministic structured state from turn metadata and content."""
 818 |         source_turns = [turn for turn in turns if turn.is_valid_openai_tool_turn]
 819 |         state = CompressedSessionState(source_turn_ids=[turn.id for turn in source_turns])
 820 |         state.task_goal = self._extract_task_goal(source_turns)
 821 |         state.current_status = self._infer_current_status(source_turns)
 822 | 
 823 |         file_paths = []
 824 |         for turn in source_turns:
 825 |             file_paths.extend(turn.files_touched)
 826 |             text = self._turn_text(turn)
 827 |             self._collect_steps(text, state.completed_steps, state.pending_steps)
 828 |             self._collect_decisions(text, state.key_decisions)
 829 |             self._collect_preferences(text, state.user_preferences)
 830 |             self._collect_commands_and_tests(turn, text, state.commands_run, state.tests_run)
 831 |             for error in turn.errors:
 832 |                 resolved = self._looks_resolved_after(source_turns, turn)
 833 |                 state.errors_encountered.append({
 834 |                     "message": error[:300],
 835 |                     "status": "resolved" if resolved else "failed",
 836 |                     "source_turn_id": turn.id,
 837 |                     "files": turn.files_touched[:5],
 838 |                     "resolved": resolved,
 839 |                 })
 840 | 
 841 |         for path in dict.fromkeys(file_paths):
 842 |             state.files_changed.append({
 843 |                 "path": path,
 844 |                 "action": self._infer_file_action(path, source_turns),
 845 |                 "summary": "从 turn 元数据提取的文件变更",
 846 |             })
 847 | 
 848 |         if any((turn.has_tool_calls or turn.tool_messages) and not turn.is_valid_openai_tool_turn for turn in turns):
 849 |             state.tool_safety_notes.append("压缩前检测到不完整或孤立 tool pair，结构化状态仅基于 provider-safe turn 聚合")
 850 |         state.tool_safety_notes.append("压缩结果不得包含半截 assistant tool call 与 tool 响应")
 851 | 
 852 |         if dropped_turns:
 853 |             dropped_categories = sorted({category for turn in dropped_turns for category in turn.categories})
 854 |             state.dropped_content_summary = f"丢弃 {len(dropped_turns)} 个较低优先级 turn"
 855 |             if dropped_categories:
 856 |                 state.dropped_content_summary += f"，类别: {', '.join(dropped_categories[:8])}"
 857 | 
 858 |         if llm_summary_text:
 859 |             state.key_decisions.extend(self._extract_llm_decision_lines(llm_summary_text))
 860 | 
 861 |         state.completed_steps = self._dedupe_keep_order(state.completed_steps)[:12]
 862 |         state.pending_steps = self._dedupe_keep_order(state.pending_steps)[:12]
 863 |         state.key_decisions = self._dedupe_keep_order(state.key_decisions)[:12]
 864 |         state.user_preferences = self._dedupe_keep_order(state.user_preferences)[:8]
 865 |         state.commands_run = self._dedupe_dicts(state.commands_run, "command")[:12]
 866 |         state.tests_run = self._dedupe_dicts(state.tests_run, "command")[:12]
 867 |         state.errors_encountered = self._dedupe_dicts(state.errors_encountered, "message")[:10]
 868 |         return state
 869 | 
 870 |     def _extract_task_goal(self, turns: List[ConversationTurn]) -> str:
 871 |         for turn in turns:
 872 |             if turn.user_message and isinstance(turn.user_message.get("content"), str):
 873 |                 content = turn.user_message.get("content", "").strip()
 874 |                 if content:
 875 |                     return content[:200]
 876 |       ...
